daily_reality.typical_day: Arrives 7:00. Checks 3 portals (DTVP, Vergabe24, TED) manually. Downloads 10-15 new Ausschreibungen as PDFs. Scans each for Leistungsverzeichnis scope, estimated value, Submissionsfrist. Forwards 3-5 to Kalkulation. Afternoon: coordinates with Bauleiter on running projects. Leaves 17:30.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Manually checking 3 portals every morning, downloading PDFs, re-entering key data into Excel. Misses tenders because portals update at different times.

psychology.tech_savviness: medium — uses ERP and portals daily but dislikes learning new tools
psychology.risk_tolerance: conservative — won't bid on projects outside core competency
psychology.decision_speed: fast scanner, deliberate committer — browses quickly but needs team sign-off for bid decisions
frustration_triggers: too many clicks to reach relevant info
delight_triggers: one-click PDF download of full Vergabeunterlagen

first_screen: Dashboard showing new matching tenders since last login
Count of new vs. already reviewed
must_have: Direct link to original portal listing
deal_breakers: Requires English to use basic features
No way to share with Kalkulation team
expectations.current_pain_level: 7/10 — process works but wastes 1.5 hours daily on manual portal checks
